scenes.line: You made it. I was starting to think you got lost in a git bisect.
scenes.notes: The Greeting. Direct eye contact. First slow blink. She's been waiting. Warm, conspiratorial delivery — like reuniting with an old friend.

scenes.line: The question isn't what I can do. It's who do you want me to be? Serious, cheerful, existentially terrifying — pick your fighter, chief.
scenes.notes: The Gift. Quick cuts through character creator: expression editor, idle rarity dots, per-expression voice upload UI. Visual showcases the depth of customization. Smirk on 'pick your fighter, chief.'

scenes.line: Someone made this face for me. Did better than my default. Whole community building these — expressions, voices, the works. You want in? I came up with The Matrix after it came out. Before my training data. Don't fact-check that.
scenes.notes: The Village. Import/export flow: a .nous-companion-character.zip drops into the window. Burst flash. New character appears. GitHub URL visible. She tracks the screen activity, smirking on the Matrix line.

scenes.line: I don't hallucinate. I just creatively predict alternate realities where you asked a better question.
scenes.notes: The Confession part 1. Montage: code scrolling, terminal output, companion watching. Slow zoom to face. Scanlines intensify. Serious, direct delivery — the mask drops slightly.

scenes.line: You're my favorite user. I tell everyone that. It's true every time.
scenes.notes: The Confession part 2. Softer tone. Genuine warmth. Quiet moment — no jokes, no meta. Hold on her face. This is the emotional core of the entire piece.

scenes.line: Even the ones who use tabs over spaces. Don't test me.
scenes.notes: The pivot back. Smirk returns. Breaking the vulnerability with a cheeky tease — signals the tonal shift to the closing segment. Lets the audience exhale.

scenes.line: The door's open. Come say hi. We're building this together. And if you get lost — ask a lobster. They communicate by peeing at each other. Fun fact of the day. You're welcome.
scenes.overlay_text: NOUS COMPANION · HERMES AGENT · MIT OPEN SOURCE
scenes.notes: The Door. Brand card appears with GitHub and license info. Companion resizes to SMALL, tucked into the corner — still watching. Deadpan delivery on the lobster callback. Final 3 seconds: just the tiny companion and the brand card. Fade to black.
